segments.voice_english: Spain crushed Argentina in the final, but the aftermath turned into a total disgrace.
segments.image_query: Spain national football team celebrating 2026 World Cup
segments.subtitle_english: Spain crushed Argentina in the final, but the aftermath turned into a total disgrace.
segments.voice_hindi: फाइनल में स्पेन ने अर्जेंटीना को हरा दिया, लेकिन उसके बाद परिणाम पूरी तरह से अपमानजनक हो गया।

segments.voice_english: Ferran Torres scored the winning goal, and Spain secured their second World Cup title.
segments.image_query: Ferran Torres celebrating goal 2026 World Cup final
segments.subtitle_english: Ferran Torres scored the winning goal, and Spain secured their 2 World Cup title.
segments.voice_hindi: फेरान टोरेस ने विजयी गोल किया और स्पेन ने अपना दूसरा विश्व कप खिताब हासिल किया।

segments.voice_english: Argentina faced massive outrage because their conduct after the final match sparked global anger.
segments.image_query: Argentina national football team disappointed on pitch
segments.subtitle_english: Argentina faced massive outrage because their conduct after the final match sparked global anger.
segments.voice_hindi: अर्जेंटीना को बड़े पैमाने पर आक्रोश का सामना करना पड़ा क्योंकि फाइनल मैच के बाद उनके आचरण से वैश्विक गुस्सा भड़क गया।

segments.voice_english: FIFA earned nine billion dollars, so this final cemented Spain as the ultimate champion.
segments.image_query: FIFA World Cup 2026 trophy celebration night
segments.subtitle_english: FIFA earned nine billion dollars, so this final cemented Spain as the ultimate champion.
segments.voice_hindi: फीफा ने नौ अरब डॉलर कमाए, इसलिए इस फाइनल ने स्पेन को अंतिम चैंपियन के रूप में स्थापित किया।

data.youtube_title: Argentina ka World Cup End: Ye Disgrace Kyun Hua? 😡💔

World Cup 2026: Argentina ki Harkat se Sab Shocked! 😱⚽
data.description: Spain ne World Cup toh jeet liya, par final ke baad jo hua usne poori duniya ko hila diya! 🇪🇸 Ferran Torres ka goal historical tha, lekin Argentina ki classless conduct ne sabka mood kharab kar diya. 🇦🇷 Kya aapko lagta hai FIFA ko unke against action lena chahiye? Comment mein batao! 👇🔥

topic: what pundits and legends are saying about Jude Bellingham

data.hook_english: Rio Ferdinand makes bold Bellingham claim.
data.cta_english: Rio ya critics, kaun sahi hai?

segments.voice_english: Rio Ferdinand proudly claimed Jude Bellingham is the best, but he faces tough critics.
segments.subtitle_english: Rio Ferdinand proudly claimed Jude Bellingham is the best, but he faces tough critics.
segments.voice_hindi: रियो फर्डिनेंड ने गर्व से दावा किया कि जूड बेलिंगहैम सर्वश्रेष्ठ हैं, लेकिन उन्हें कड़े आलोचकों का सामना करना पड़ता है।

segments.voice_english: An England legend defended Bellingham because he silenced the critics over his drinking habits.
segments.subtitle_english: An England legend defended Bellingham because he silenced the critics over his drinking habits.
segments.voice_hindi: इंग्लैंड के एक दिग्गज खिलाड़ी ने बेलिंगहैम का बचाव किया क्योंकि उन्होंने अपनी शराब पीने की आदतों को लेकर आलोचकों को चुप करा दिया था।

segments.voice_english: Jude Bellingham told reporters everyone is saying that his brother Jobe is better now.
segments.subtitle_english: Jude Bellingham told reporters everyone is saying that his brother Jobe is better now.
segments.voice_hindi: जूड बेलिंगहैम ने संवाददाताओं से कहा कि हर कोई कह रहा है कि उसका भाई जोबे अब बेहतर है।

segments.voice_english: Former England players shared their views, but do you agree with Rio's bold claim?
segments.subtitle_english: Former England players shared their views, but do you agree with Rio's bold claim?
segments.voice_hindi: इंग्लैंड के पूर्व खिलाड़ियों ने अपने विचार साझा किए, लेकिन क्या आप रियो के साहसिक दावे से सहमत हैं?

data.youtube_title: Jude Bellingham ka Real Sach: Kya Jobe unse bhi better hai? 🤯⚽
title_options: Jude Bellingham ka Real Sach: Kya Jobe unse bhi better hai? 🤯⚽
Rio Ferdinand ka Bold Claim: Jude Bellingham hi Best hai! 🔥
Jude Bellingham: Critics ko chup karaya, par brother ka darr? 💀
data.description: Rio Ferdinand ne toh keh diya ki Jude Bellingham best hai, par kya asli sach kuch aur hai? 😱 England legends ne bhi unhe defend kiya jab log unki lifestyle par sawal utha rahe the. Aur wait, Jude ne khud bataya ki sab bol rahe hain ki unka bhai Jobe unse bhi zyada talented hai! 🤯 Aapko kya lagta hai, kya Jobe sach mein Jude ko peeche chhod denge? Comments mein batao! 👇⚽
